name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: seo_content_generation
prompts.template: Generate SEO optimized marketing copy targeting {target_audience} focused on {product_or_service} with keywords: {keywords}.
prompts.use_case: Creating SEO-friendly marketing copy tailored for AI-driven campaigns

prompts.name: cro_optimization_analysis
prompts.template: Analyze the provided campaign data: {campaign_parameters} and suggest CRO strategies to improve conversion rates.
prompts.use_case: Improving website conversion rates through data-backed CRO methodologies

prompts.name: growth_strategy_recommendation
prompts.template: Based on analytics metrics: {analytics_metrics}, recommend actionable growth engineering strategies.
prompts.use_case: Generating analytics reports to assess marketing impact for stakeholders
